1087.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever intends to perform Hajj, let him hasten to do so.'
1087.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang berkeinginan untuk berhaji, hendaklah ia bersegera melakukannya.'

1088.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Umamah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever is not prevented from performing Hajj by an obvious need, an unjust ruler, or a confining illness, then dies without having performed Hajj, let him die as a Jew or a Christian if he wishes.'
1088.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Umamah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa tidak dihalangi dari haji oleh kebutuhan yang nyata, penguasa yang zalim, atau penyakit yang membelenggunya, lalu ia mati tanpa berhaji, maka hendaklah ia mati sebagai Yahudi atau Nasrani jika ia mau.'

1089.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Arqam (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ي performed one Hajj after his migration.
1089.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid bin Arqam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ي melaksanakan satu kali haji setelah hijrahnya.

1090.iwh_en: Abu Ishaq said: 'The Prophet ي performed one Hajj before his migration.'
1090.iwh_id: Abu Ishaq berkata: 'Nabi ي melaksanakan satu kali haji sebelum hijrahnya.'

1091.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that Qatadah said: I asked Anas how many times the Prophet ي performed Hajj, and he said: 'One Hajj and four Umrahs: his first Umrah when the polytheists prevented him from the House; his second Umrah when they made a treaty with him and he returned the following year; his Umrah from al-Ji'ranah when he distributed the spoils of Hunayn in Dhul-Qa'dah; and his Umrah along with his Hajj.'
1091.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas bin Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Qatadah berkata: Saya bertanya kepada Anas berapa kali Nabi ي berhaji, lalu ia menjawab: 'Satu kali haji dan empat kali umrah: umrahnya yang pertama ketika orang-orang musyrik menghalanginya dari Baitullah; umrahnya yang kedua ketika mereka berdamai dengannya lalu ia kembali pada tahun berikutnya; umrahnya dari Ji'ranah ketika membagikan ghanimah Hunain di bulan Dzulqa'dah; dan umrahnya bersama hajinya.'

1092.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Hajj has been prescribed upon you.' It was asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, every year?' He said: 'No. Had I said yes, it would have become obligatory. Hajj is once, and whatever is beyond that is voluntary.'
1092.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Haji telah diwajibkan atas kalian.' Ditanyakan: 'Ya Rasulullah, setiap tahun?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak. Seandainya aku mengatakannya, niscaya ia menjadi wajib. Haji itu sekali, dan apa yang lebih dari itu adalah sunnah.'

1093.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever performs Hajj and does not engage in sexual relations or acts of disobedience, returns as on the day his mother bore him.'
1093.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berhaji dan tidak melakukan hubungan suami istri maupun perbuatan maksiat, ia kembali seperti pada hari ibunya melahirkannya.'

1094.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever performs Hajj to this House without engaging in sexual relations or acts of disobedience returns as on the day his mother bore him.'
1094.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berhaji ke rumah ini tanpa melakukan hubungan suami istri maupun perbuatan maksiat, ia kembali seperti pada hari ibunya melahirkannya.'

1095.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The Hajj and Umrah efface whatever comes before them.'
1095.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Haji dan umrah menghapus dosa-dosa yang terjadi sebelumnya.'

1096.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The reward for an accepted Hajj is nothing less than Paradise.'
1096.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Tidak ada balasan bagi haji yang mabrur kecuali surga.'

1097.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Umrah to Umrah is an expiation for what is between them, and the reward for an accepted Hajj is nothing less than Paradise.'
1097.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Dari umrah ke umrah adalah kafarat bagi dosa-dosa di antara keduanya, dan tidak ada balasan bagi haji yang mabrur kecuali surga.'

1098.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Perform Hajj and Umrah consecutively, for they remove poverty and sins just as the bellows removes impurities from iron.'
1098.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Ikutkanlah haji dengan umrah, karena keduanya menghapus kefakiran dan dosa sebagaimana alat pandai besi menghilangkan kotoran dari besi.'

1099.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Masud (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Alternate between Hajj and Umrah, for they remove poverty and sins just as the bellows removes dross from iron, gold, and silver, and the accepted Hajj has no reward less than Paradise.'
1099.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Masud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Ikutkanlah haji dengan umrah, karena keduanya menghilangkan kefakiran dan dosa sebagaimana alat pandai besi menghilangkan kotoran dari besi, emas, dan perak, dan tidak ada balasan bagi haji yang mabrur kecuali surga.'

1100.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'O Messenger of Allah, we see that Jihad is the best of deeds. Should we not perform Jihad?' He said: 'The best Jihad is an accepted Hajj.'
1100.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, kami melihat bahwa jihad adalah sebaik-baik amal. Apakah kami tidak perlu berjihad?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jihad yang paling utama adalah haji yang mabrur.'

1101.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Messenger of Allah ي: 'O Messenger of Allah, is Jihad obligatory upon women?' He said: 'Yes, upon them is a Jihad that contains no fighting: Hajj and Umrah.'
1101.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ي: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah jihad wajib bagi wanita?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, bagi mereka ada jihad yang tidak mengandung peperangan: haji dan umrah.'

1102.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Those performing Hajj and Umrah are the guests of Allah. If they supplicate He answers them, and if they seek forgiveness He forgives them.'
1102.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Para jamaah haji dan umrah adalah tamu Allah. Jika mereka berdoa, Allah mengabulkan mereka, dan jika mereka memohon ampun, Allah mengampuni mereka.'

1103.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The pilgrim on Hajj is forgiven, and the one for whom the pilgrim seeks forgiveness is forgiven.'
1103.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Orang yang berhaji diampuni, dan orang yang dimintakan ampun oleh orang yang berhaji juga diampuni.'

1104.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever performs Hajj on behalf of a deceased person, it is recorded for the deceased and the living person has the reward of one who performed Hajj from the beginning.'
1104.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berhaji atas nama orang yang telah meninggal, hal itu dicatat untuk orang yang telah meninggal, dan orang yang masih hidup mendapat pahala seperti orang yang berhaji dari awal.'

1105.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that a woman from the tribe of Khath'am asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, the obligation of Allah upon His servants to perform Hajj has come to my father when he is very old and cannot stay firm on a mount. May I perform Hajj on his behalf?' He said: 'Yes.'
1105.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa seorang wanita dari suku Khats'am bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, kewajiban Allah atas hamba-Nya untuk berhaji telah tiba kepada ayahku ketika ia sangat tua dan tidak dapat duduk tegak di atas tunggangan. Bolehkah aku berhaji atas namanya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya.'

1106.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that a woman said: 'O Messenger of Allah, my father was obligated to perform Hajj but he died before performing it. May I perform it on his behalf?' He said: 'Perform Hajj on his behalf. Do you not see that if your father had a debt you would pay it off? Pay off the debt owed to Allah, for Allah is more deserving of repayment.'
1106.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa seorang wanita berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, ayahku diwajibkan haji namun meninggal sebelum melaksanakannya. Bolehkah aku berhaji atas namanya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Berhajilah atas namanya. Tidakkah kamu melihat bahwa jika ayahmu memiliki hutang maka kamu akan melunasinya? Lunaskanlah hutang kepada Allah, karena Allah lebih berhak untuk dilunasi.'

1107.iwh_en: It was narrated from Buraydah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a woman asked the Messenger of Allah ي: 'My mother died and had not performed the obligatory Hajj. May I perform it on her behalf?' He said: 'Perform Hajj on her behalf.'
1107.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Buraydah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang wanita bertanya kepada Rasulullah ي: 'Ibuku meninggal dan belum melaksanakan haji wajib. Bolehkah aku berhaji atas namanya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Berhajilah atas namanya.'

1108.iwh_en: It was narrated from Buraydah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a woman said: 'O Messenger of Allah, my mother died without having performed Hajj. May I perform Hajj on her behalf?' He said: 'Yes, perform Hajj on her behalf.'
1108.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Buraydah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang wanita berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, ibuku meninggal tanpa melaksanakan haji. Bolehkah aku berhaji atas namanya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, berhajilah atas namanya.'

1109.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Razin al-Uqayli (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'O Messenger of Allah, my father is very old, he cannot perform Hajj or Umrah, and he cannot travel.' The Prophet ي said: 'Perform Hajj and Umrah on behalf of your father.'
1109.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Razin al-Uqayli (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, ayahku sangat tua, tidak mampu berhaji atau berumrah, dan tidak mampu melakukan perjalanan.' Nabi ي bersabda: 'Berhaji dan berumrahlah atas nama ayahmu.'

1110.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever is able to perform Hajj and does not do so, it does not matter whether he dies as a Jew or a Christian.'
1110.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali bin Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mampu berhaji namun tidak melakukannya, tidak ada bedanya apakah ia mati sebagai Yahudi atau Nasrani.'

1111.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي was asked about the best of deeds. He said: 'Belief in Allah and His Messenger.' It was asked: 'Then what?' He said: 'Jihad in the way of Allah.' It was asked: 'Then what?' He said: 'An accepted Hajj.'
1111.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي ditanya tentang amal yang paling utama. Beliau bersabda: 'Iman kepada Allah dan Rasul-Nya.' Ditanyakan: 'Kemudian apa?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jihad di jalan Allah.' Ditanyakan: 'Kemudian apa?' Beliau bersabda: 'Haji yang mabrur.'

1112.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'This House has been made an obligation by Allah upon every Muslim who is able to undertake the journey to it.'
1112.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Rumah ini telah diwajibkan oleh Allah atas setiap Muslim yang mampu untuk melakukan perjalanan kepadanya.'

1113.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said regarding the verse: 'And Hajj to the House is a duty that mankind owes to Allah, those who can afford the journey.' He said: 'Provision and a riding animal.'
1113.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda mengenai ayat: 'Dan bagi Allah wajib atas manusia untuk melaksanakan haji ke Baitullah bagi yang mampu mengadakan perjalanan ke sana.' Beliau bersabda: 'Bekal dan kendaraan.'

1114.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked the Messenger of Allah ي: 'What makes Hajj obligatory?' He said: 'Provisions and a riding animal.'
1114.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas bin Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepada Rasulullah ي: 'Apa yang mewajibkan haji?' Beliau bersabda: 'Bekal dan kendaraan.'

1115.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ي was asked: 'What makes Hajj obligatory?' She said: 'He replied: Provisions and a riding animal that can carry the person to the House of Allah.'
1115.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ي ditanya: 'Apa yang mewajibkan haji?' Ia berkata: 'Beliau menjawab: Bekal dan kendaraan yang dapat membawa seseorang ke Baitullah.'

1116.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'A woman must not travel except with a mahram, and no man should enter upon a woman unless her mahram is with her.' A man stood up and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I have been enlisted in such-and-such an army, and my wife has gone out for Hajj.' He said: 'Go and perform Hajj with your wife.'
1116.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Seorang wanita tidak boleh bepergian kecuali bersama mahramnya, dan seorang laki-laki tidak boleh masuk menemui seorang wanita kecuali mahramnya bersamanya.' Seorang laki-laki berdiri dan berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, aku telah didaftarkan dalam pasukan ini dan itu, sementara istriku telah pergi untuk haji.' Beliau bersabda: 'Pergilah dan berhajilah bersama istrimu.'

1117.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'A woman must not travel for two days except with her husband or a mahram.'
1117.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Seorang wanita tidak boleh melakukan perjalanan dua hari kecuali bersama suaminya atau mahramnya.'

1118.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'It is not permissible for a woman who believes in Allah and the Last Day to travel a journey of three days or more unless her father, son, husband, brother, or a mahram is with her.'
1118.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Tidak halal bagi seorang wanita yang beriman kepada Allah dan hari akhir untuk melakukan perjalanan tiga hari atau lebih kecuali bersama ayahnya, anaknya, suaminya, saudaranya, atau mahramnya.'

1119.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'A woman must not travel for three nights except with a mahram.'
1119.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Seorang wanita tidak boleh melakukan perjalanan tiga malam kecuali bersama mahramnya.'

1120.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Do not let any woman travel except with a mahram.'
1120.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Janganlah seorang wanita bepergian kecuali bersama mahram.'

1121.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'No woman should travel except with a mahram and no man should be alone with a woman unless her mahram is present.'
1121.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Tidak boleh seorang wanita bepergian kecuali bersama mahram dan tidak boleh seorang laki-laki berduaan dengan seorang wanita kecuali mahramnya hadir.'

1122.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever departs for Hajj or Umrah and dies, Allah will write for him the reward of the pilgrim until the Day of Resurrection.'
1122.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berangkat untuk haji atau umrah lalu meninggal dunia, Allah akan mencatat baginya pahala jamaah haji hingga hari kiamat.'

1123.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said about a man who was killed while in ihram: 'Wash him with water and lotus leaves, wrap him in his two garments, do not apply perfume to him, and do not cover his head, for he will be raised on the Day of Resurrection saying: Labbayk.'
1123.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda tentang seorang laki-laki yang terbunuh dalam keadaan ihram: 'Mandikan dia dengan air dan daun bidara, bungkuslah dengan dua kainnya, jangan beri wewangian, dan jangan tutup kepalanya, karena ia akan dibangkitkan pada hari kiamat dalam keadaan mengucapkan: Labbayk.'

1124.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي instructed regarding a man who had fallen from his mount and died: 'Wash him with water and lotus leaves, shroud him in his two garments, and do not cover his head and do not apply perfume to him, for he will be resurrected on the Day of Resurrection reciting the Talbiyah.'
1124.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي memerintahkan tentang seorang laki-laki yang jatuh dari kendaraannya dan meninggal: 'Mandikan dia dengan air dan daun bidara, kafani dengan dua kainnya, dan jangan tutup kepalanya serta jangan beri wewangian, karena ia akan dibangkitkan pada hari kiamat dalam keadaan membaca talbiyah.'

1125.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ي was asked about a child who performs Hajj, does the Hajj count for him? He said: 'Yes, and he has a reward.'
1125.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ي ditanya tentang seorang anak yang melaksanakan haji, apakah hajinya sah? Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, dan ia mendapat pahala.'

1126.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that a woman lifted a child and asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, is there Hajj for this one?' He said: 'Yes, and you will have a reward.'
1126.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa seorang wanita mengangkat seorang anak dan bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah ada haji untuk anak ini?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, dan bagimu ada pahala.'

1127.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'This House is a support for Islam, and whoever intends it for Hajj or Umrah is under the protection of Allah. If he dies, he enters Paradise, and if he returns, he returns with reward and bounty.'
1127.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Rumah ini adalah tiang penyangga Islam, dan barangsiapa menuju kepadanya untuk haji atau umrah berada di bawah perlindungan Allah. Jika ia meninggal, ia masuk surga, dan jika ia kembali, ia kembali dengan pahala dan karunia.'

1128.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'When you meet the pilgrim, greet him and shake his hand, and ask him to seek forgiveness for you before he enters his house, for he is forgiven.'
1128.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Apabila kamu bertemu dengan jamaah haji, ucapkan salam kepadanya dan berjabat tanganlah dengannya, dan mintalah ia memohonkan ampun untukmu sebelum ia masuk ke rumahnya, karena ia telah diampuni.'

1129.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The jihad of the elderly, the weak, and the woman is Hajj and Umrah.'
1129.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Jihadnya orang tua, orang lemah, dan wanita adalah haji dan umrah.'

1130.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Messenger of Allah ي about the first mosque laid down on earth. He said: 'The Sacred Mosque.' Abu Dharr asked: 'Then which?' He said: 'Al-Masjid al-Aqsa.' Abu Dharr asked: 'How many years between them?' He said: 'Forty years. But wherever prayer time comes upon you, pray, for that is a mosque for you.'
1130.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ي tentang masjid pertama yang dibangun di muka bumi. Beliau bersabda: 'Masjidil Haram.' Abu Dzar bertanya: 'Kemudian mana?' Beliau bersabda: 'Masjidil Aqsha.' Abu Dzar bertanya: 'Berapa tahun jarak antara keduanya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Empat puluh tahun. Namun di mana pun waktu shalat menemuimu, shalatlah, karena itulah masjid bagimu.'

1131.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Do not undertake a journey except to three mosques: al-Masjid al-Haram, this mosque of mine, and al-Masjid al-Aqsa.'
1131.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Janganlah melakukan perjalanan kecuali ke tiga masjid: Masjidil Haram, masjidku ini, dan Masjidil Aqsha.'

1132.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Do not undertake a journey except to three mosques: al-Masjid al-Haram, al-Masjid al-Aqsa, and this mosque of mine.'
1132.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Janganlah melakukan perjalanan kecuali ke tiga masjid: Masjidil Haram, Masjidil Aqsha, dan masjidku ini.'

1133.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Prayer in my mosque is better than a thousand prayers elsewhere, except the Sacred Mosque, and prayer in the Sacred Mosque is better than a hundred thousand prayers elsewhere.'
1133.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Shalat di masjidku lebih baik dari seribu shalat di tempat lain, kecuali Masjidil Haram, dan shalat di Masjidil Haram lebih baik dari seratus ribu shalat di tempat lain.'

1134.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي began his Talbiyah when he mounted his mount at the miqat, and the Talbiyah is: Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk, Labbayk la sharika laka Labbayk, inna al-hamd wa-l-ni'mata laka wa-l-mulk, la sharika lak.
1134.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي memulai talbiyahnya ketika menaiki kendaraannya di miqat, dan talbiyahnya adalah: Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk, Labbayk laa syarika laka Labbayk, innal hamda wan ni'mata laka wal mulk, laa syarika lak.

1135.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Talbiyah of the Messenger of Allah ي was: Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk, Labbayk la sharika laka Labbayk, inna al-hamd wa-l-ni'mata laka wa-l-mulk, la sharika lak. The people add to this but the Prophet ي did not say more than this.
1135.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa talbiyah Rasulullah ي adalah: Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk, Labbayk laa syarika laka Labbayk, innal hamda wan ni'mata laka wal mulk, laa syarika lak. Orang-orang menambahkan pada talbiyah ini namun Nabi ي tidak mengucapkan lebih dari ini.

1136.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Talbiyah of the Messenger of Allah ي was: Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk, Labbayk la sharika laka Labbayk, inna al-hamd wa-l-ni'mata laka wa-l-mulk, la sharika lak. And Ibn Umar added to it: Labbayk wa-sa'dayk wa-l-khayr bi-yadayk wa-l-raghba ilayk wa-l-'amal.
1136.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa talbiyah Rasulullah ي adalah: Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk, Labbayk laa syarika laka Labbayk, innal hamda wan ni'mata laka wal mulk, laa syarika lak. Dan Ibnu Umar menambahkan: Labbayk wa sa'dayk wal khairu bi-yadayk war-raghba ilayk wal 'amal.

1137.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I know how the Prophet ي used to say the Talbiyah.' Then she narrated it as: Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk, Labbayk la sharika laka Labbayk, inna al-hamd wa-l-ni'mata laka wa-l-mulk, la sharika lak.
1137.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tahu bagaimana Nabi ي mengucapkan talbiyah.' Kemudian ia menyebutkannya: Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk, Labbayk laa syarika laka Labbayk, innal hamda wan ni'mata laka wal mulk, laa syarika lak.

1138.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever enters into a state of ihram for Hajj or Umrah and dies, his reward is recorded with Allah until the Day of Resurrection, and Allah does not withhold from him any of the reward He has promised.'
1138.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berihram untuk haji atau umrah kemudian meninggal, pahalanya dicatat di sisi Allah hingga hari kiamat, dan Allah tidak mengurangi sedikitpun dari pahala yang telah dijanjikan-Nya.'

1139.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The one in ihram must not wear a shirt, turban, trousers, a hooded garment, or khuffs, unless he cannot find sandals, in which case he may wear khuffs cut below the ankles.'
1139.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Orang yang berihram tidak boleh memakai gamis, sorban, celana, jubah berjahit, atau sepatu khuf, kecuali jika tidak mendapatkan sandal, maka ia boleh memakai khuf yang dipotong di bawah mata kaki.'

1140.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The muhrim (one in ihram) should not wear a shirt, turban, trousers, a cloak, or khuffs, except one who cannot find sandals - then he may wear khuffs, but he should cut them below the ankles. And he should not wear any garment touched by saffron or wars.'
1140.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Orang yang berihram tidak boleh memakai gamis, sorban, celana, jubah, atau khuf, kecuali yang tidak mendapatkan sandal maka ia boleh memakai khuf dan hendaknya dipotong di bawah mata kaki. Dan janganlah ia memakai pakaian yang disentuh za'faran atau wars.'

1141.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Do not wear sewn garments, do not wear turbans, do not wear trousers, do not wear caps, and do not wear khuffs, except one who cannot find sandals, in which case he may wear khuffs cut below the ankle. Do not wear any garment touched by saffron or wars.'
1141.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Janganlah memakai pakaian berjahit, jangan memakai sorban, jangan memakai celana, jangan memakai topi, dan jangan memakai khuf, kecuali yang tidak mendapatkan sandal maka boleh memakai khuf yang dipotong di bawah mata kaki. Dan janganlah memakai pakaian yang menyentuh za'faran atau wars.'

1142.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I applied perfume to the Messenger of Allah ي with my own hands before he entered his ihram, and when he finished his ihram before he circumambulated the House.'
1142.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mengusapkan wewangian kepada Rasulullah ي dengan tanganku sendiri sebelum beliau berihram, dan ketika beliau selesai dari ihramnya sebelum tawaf di Baitullah.'

1143.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I applied perfume to the Messenger of Allah ي when he entered ihram and when he ended his ihram, before he made the circumambulation of the House.'
1143.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mengusapkan wewangian kepada Rasulullah ي ketika beliau berihram dan ketika beliau mengakhiri ihramnya, sebelum beliau melakukan tawaf di Baitullah.'

1144.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I can still see the gleam of the perfume in the parting of the Messenger of Allah ي's hair while he was in the state of ihram.'
1144.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku masih bisa melihat kilap wewangian di sela-sela rambut Rasulullah ي ketika beliau dalam keadaan ihram.'

1145.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I applied the best perfume I could find to the Messenger of Allah ي when he entered his ihram.'
1145.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mengusapkan wewangian terbaik yang aku temukan kepada Rasulullah ي ketika beliau berihram.'

1146.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'We applied dharirah perfume to the Messenger of Allah ي when he was in ihram.'
1146.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami mengusapkan wewangian dharirah kepada Rasulullah ي ketika beliau dalam keadaan ihram.'

1147.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The one in ihram should not be married off, should not marry, and should not propose marriage.'
1147.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Orang yang berihram tidak boleh menikahkan, tidak boleh menikah, dan tidak boleh melamar.'

1148.iwh_en: It was narrated from Uthman ibn Affan (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The muhrim (one in ihram) must not marry, arrange a marriage, or be betrothed.'
1148.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Utsman bin Affan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Orang yang berihram tidak boleh menikah, menikahkan, maupun meminang.'

1149.iwh_en: It was narrated from Uthman ibn Affan (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The muhrim must not marry or arrange marriage for anyone.'
1149.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Utsman bin Affan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Orang yang berihram tidak boleh menikah atau menikahkan siapapun.'

1150.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'There is no Hajj without the imam.' And he pointed towards the east.
1150.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Tidak ada haji tanpa imam.' Dan beliau menunjuk ke arah timur.

1151.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي performed Hajj, and we went out with him. When we reached Dhul-Hulayfah, Asmaa bint Umays gave birth to Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr. She sent to the Prophet ي asking what she should do. He said: 'Bathe, bind your cloth firmly, and enter into ihram.'
1151.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي berhaji, dan kami keluar bersamanya. Ketika kami sampai di Dzul Hulaifah, Asma binti Umais melahirkan Muhammad bin Abi Bakr. Ia mengirim pesan kepada Nabi ي menanyakan apa yang harus ia lakukan. Beliau bersabda: 'Mandilah, ikatlah kainmu dengan kuat, dan masuklah ke dalam ihram.'

1152.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي performed four Umrahs, all of them in Dhul-Qa'dah: his Umrah from al-Hudaybiyah, his Umrah in the following year, his Umrah from al-Ji'ranah when he distributed the spoils of Hunayn, and his Umrah with his Hajj.
1152.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas bin Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي melaksanakan empat kali umrah, semuanya di bulan Dzulqa'dah: umrahnya dari Hudaibiyah, umrahnya pada tahun berikutnya, umrahnya dari Ji'ranah ketika membagikan ghanimah Hunain, dan umrahnya bersama hajinya.

1153.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي assumed ihram from Dhul-Hulayfah for Umrah, then performed the Tawaf of the Ka'bah, then performed sa'y between Safa and Marwa, then he came out of ihram. This is according to the Sunnah, and whoever does this has followed the Sunnah.
1153.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي berihram dari Dzul Hulaifah untuk umrah, kemudian tawaf mengelilingi Ka'bah, kemudian sa'i antara Shafa dan Marwa, kemudian ia keluar dari ihram. Ini adalah sunnah, dan barangsiapa melakukan ini berarti telah mengikuti sunnah.

1154.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ي began Hajj with Tawaf when he arrived, and the first thing he did was perform Tawaf of the Ka'bah. Those who performed Hajj with livestock offered sacrifice and did not come out of ihram. Those who performed Umrah came out of ihram after Tawaf and Sa'y between Safa and Marwa.
1154.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ي memulai haji dengan tawaf ketika tiba, dan hal pertama yang beliau lakukan adalah tawaf mengelilingi Ka'bah. Mereka yang berhaji dengan membawa hewan kurban berkorban dan tidak keluar dari ihram. Mereka yang berumrah keluar dari ihram setelah tawaf dan sa'i antara Shafa dan Marwa.

1155.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw the Prophet ي enter the Ka'bah from its high side, and he did not pray inside it. He said: 'I testified that the Messenger of Allah ي circled the Ka'bah seven times and prayed two rak'ahs behind the Maqam, then touched the Black Stone.'
1155.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia melihat Nabi ي masuk ke Ka'bah dari sisi atasnya, dan beliau tidak shalat di dalamnya. Ia berkata: 'Aku bersaksi bahwa Rasulullah ي mengelilingi Ka'bah tujuh kali dan shalat dua rakaat di belakang Maqam, kemudian menyentuh Hajar Aswad.'

1156.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw the Prophet ي upon his arrival in Mecca touch the Black Stone, then run three times around the Ka'bah and walk four times.
1156.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia melihat Nabi ي ketika tiba di Makkah menyentuh Hajar Aswad, kemudian berlari-lari kecil tiga kali mengelilingi Ka'bah dan berjalan empat kali.

1157.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي used to touch the Yemeni corner and the Black Stone in every circuit of the Tawaf.
1157.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي menyentuh sudut Yamani dan Hajar Aswad pada setiap putaran tawaf.

1158.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ي performed Tawaf on his camel, and whenever he passed the corner he pointed to it with something that was in his hand and said: Allahu Akbar.'
1158.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ي bertawaf di atas untanya, dan setiap kali melewati sudut beliau memberi isyarat dengan sesuatu yang ada di tangannya dan mengucapkan: Allahu Akbar.'

1159.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ي performed Tawaf while riding, and he would point with his stick to the Black Stone and kiss the stick.'
1159.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ي bertawaf sambil berkendaraan, dan beliau menunjuk tongkatnya ke Hajar Aswad dan mencium tongkat tersebut.'

1160.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي came to Mecca and circumambulated the House seven times, then prayed two rak'ahs behind the Maqam, then went to the Safa and performed Sa'y between Safa and Marwa seven times.
1160.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي datang ke Makkah dan mengelilingi Baitullah tujuh kali, kemudian shalat dua rakaat di belakang Maqam, kemudian menuju Shafa dan melakukan sa'i antara Shafa dan Marwa tujuh kali.

1161.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Tawaf around the House is like prayer, except that Allah has permitted speech in it, so whoever speaks let him speak only good.'
1161.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Tawaf di sekeliling Ka'bah itu seperti shalat, kecuali bahwa Allah membolehkan berbicara di dalamnya, maka barangsiapa yang berbicara hendaklah ia hanya mengucapkan yang baik.'

1162.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي made Sa'y between Safa and Marwa on foot, and walked to Mina and Arafah.
1162.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي melakukan sa'i antara Shafa dan Marwa dengan berjalan kaki, dan berjalan kaki menuju Mina dan Arafah.

1163.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw the Prophet ي when he came to Safa, he climbed it until he could see the House, faced the qiblah, praised Allah, made takbir and tahlil three times, then supplicated.'
1163.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Nabi ي ketika beliau datang ke Shafa, beliau menaikinya hingga dapat melihat Ka'bah, menghadap kiblat, memuji Allah, bertakbir dan bertahlil tiga kali, kemudian berdoa.'

1164.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The Black Stone descended from Paradise, and it was whiter than milk, but the sins of the sons of Adam made it black.'
1164.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Hajar Aswad turun dari surga, dan dahulunya lebih putih dari susu, namun dosa-dosa anak Adam lah yang membuatnya menjadi hitam.'

1165.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Touching the Black Stone and the Yemeni Corner removes sins.'
1165.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas bin Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Menyentuh Hajar Aswad dan sudut Yamani menghapus dosa-dosa.'

1166.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ي say: Touching them both - meaning the Black Stone and the Yemeni corner - removes sins.'
1166.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ي bersabda: Menyentuh keduanya - yakni Hajar Aswad dan sudut Yamani - menghapus dosa-dosa.'

1167.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said regarding the Black Stone: 'By Allah, Allah will resurrect it on the Day of Resurrection with two eyes by which it sees and a tongue by which it speaks, and it will bear witness for whoever touched it in sincerity.'
1167.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda tentang Hajar Aswad: 'Demi Allah, Allah akan membangkitkannya pada hari kiamat dengan dua mata yang dengannya ia melihat dan lisan yang dengannya ia berbicara, dan ia akan bersaksi bagi siapa yang menyentuhnya dengan penuh keikhlasan.'

1168.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Amr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ي say: 'The Black Stone and the Maqam Ibrahim are two jewels from the jewels of Paradise. Had it not been for the sins of the children of Adam, they would have lit up whatever is between the east and the west.'
1168.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah bin Amr (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Hajar Aswad dan Maqam Ibrahim adalah dua permata dari permata-permata surga. Seandainya bukan karena dosa-dosa anak Adam, keduanya akan menerangi apa yang ada di antara timur dan barat.'

1169.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي went to the House on the Day of Sacrifice, performed Tawaf, then came to Zamzam and drank from it while standing.
1169.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي pergi ke Ka'bah pada hari penyembelihan, bertawaf, kemudian datang ke Zamzam dan minum dari situ sambil berdiri.

1170.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ي drank Zamzam water while standing.'
1170.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ي minum air Zamzam dalam keadaan berdiri.'

1171.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The best water on the face of the earth is Zamzam water; in it is food that satisfies hunger and a cure for illness.'
1171.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Sebaik-baik air di muka bumi adalah air Zamzam; di dalamnya terdapat makanan yang mengenyangkan dan obat bagi penyakit.'

1172.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Zamzam water is for whatever purpose it is drunk for.'
1172.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Air Zamzam adalah sesuai dengan tujuan diminumnya.'

1173.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Zamzam water is for whatever it is drunk for. If you drink it seeking healing, Allah will heal you. If you drink it to be satisfied, Allah will satisfy you. If you drink it to quench thirst, Allah will quench your thirst. It is dug by Jibreel and the drink of Ismail.'
1173.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Air Zamzam adalah sesuai dengan tujuan diminumnya. Jika kamu meminumnya untuk mencari kesembuhan, Allah akan menyembuhkanmu. Jika kamu meminumnya untuk kenyang, Allah akan mengenyangkanmu. Jika kamu meminumnya untuk melepas dahaga, Allah akan melepas dahagamu. Ia digali oleh Jibril dan merupakan minuman Ismail.'

1174.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي departed from Mina when he had prayed Fajr in the morning of Arafah, until he came to Arafah.
1174.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي berangkat dari Mina setelah shalat Subuh pada pagi hari Arafah, hingga tiba di Arafah.

1175.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'I have performed Hajj here, and Arafah is all a place of standing.'
1175.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Aku telah melaksanakan haji di sini, dan seluruh Arafah adalah tempat wukuf.'

1176.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Hajj is Arafah, Hajj is Arafah, Hajj is Arafah. The days of Mina are three, and whoever hastens in two days there is no sin upon him, and whoever delays there is no sin upon him.'
1176.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali bin Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Haji adalah Arafah, haji adalah Arafah, haji adalah Arafah. Hari-hari Mina adalah tiga hari, dan barangsiapa bersegera dalam dua hari tidak ada dosa baginya, dan barangsiapa mengakhirkan tidak ada dosa baginya.'

1177.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdurrahman ibn Yamur (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Hajj is Arafah. Whoever reaches Arafah before the dawn prayer on the night of jam' (Muzdalifah), his Hajj is complete.'
1177.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdurrahman bin Ya'mur (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Haji adalah Arafah. Barangsiapa yang mencapai Arafah sebelum shalat Subuh pada malam jam' (Muzdalifah), maka hajinya sempurna.'

1178.iwh_en: It was narrated from Urwah ibn Mudarris (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I came to the Messenger of Allah ي at al-Muzdalifah when he was going out for the prayer.' The Prophet ي said: 'Whoever prays with us this prayer and stays until we leave, and he had stood at Arafah before this by night or day, then his Hajj is complete.'
1178.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Urwah bin Mudarris (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku datang kepada Rasulullah ي di Muzdalifah ketika beliau sedang keluar untuk shalat.' Nabi ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa shalat bersama kami shalat ini dan tinggal sampai kami pergi, dan ia telah wukuf di Arafah sebelumnya pada malam atau siang hari, maka hajinya sempurna.'

1179.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'This day, this month, and this city are sacred. Your blood, your wealth, and your honor are sacred to you like the sacredness of this day, this month, and this city.'
1179.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Hari ini, bulan ini, dan kota ini adalah suci. Darah kalian, harta kalian, dan kehormatan kalian adalah suci bagi kalian seperti kesucian hari ini, bulan ini, dan kota ini.'

1180.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Mecca is not permissible to be conquered by war or by cutting its trees, except for the Messenger of Allah for one hour of a day. Today it has returned to its status of sanctity as it was yesterday, so let those who are present inform those who are absent.'
1180.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Makkah tidak diperbolehkan ditaklukkan dengan perang atau dengan menebang pohon-pohonnya, kecuali bagi Rasulullah selama satu jam dalam sehari. Hari ini telah kembali ke status kesuciannya seperti kemarin, maka hendaklah yang hadir menyampaikan kepada yang tidak hadir.'

1181.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said on the Day of the Conquest: 'This land is sacred. Its plants should not be cut and its trees should not be felled. Whoever finds something, let him announce it for a year. Its game should not be frightened away, and its lost property should not be picked up except by one who announces it.'
1181.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda pada Hari Penaklukan: 'Tanah ini suci. Tanamannya tidak boleh dipotong dan pohon-pohonnya tidak boleh ditebang. Barangsiapa menemukan sesuatu, hendaklah ia mengumumkannya selama satu tahun. Binatang buruannya tidak boleh diusir dan barang temuannya tidak boleh dipungut kecuali oleh orang yang mengumumkannya.'

1182.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'It is not permissible to carry weapons in Mecca.'
1182.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Tidak diperbolehkan membawa senjata di Makkah.'

1183.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said on the Day of the Conquest: 'Mecca is sacred; it was not permitted for any before me and it will not be permitted for any after me. It was permitted for me only for an hour of a day.'
1183.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda pada Hari Penaklukan: 'Makkah adalah tanah suci; ia tidak diperbolehkan bagi siapapun sebelumku dan tidak akan diperbolehkan bagi siapapun setelahku. Ia hanya diperbolehkan bagiku selama satu jam dalam sehari.'

1184.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The game of Medina is sacred between its two lava plains, and its trees should not be cut and no sin should be committed in it.'
1184.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Binatang buruan Madinah adalah haram di antara dua dataran lava-nya, pohon-pohonnya tidak boleh ditebang dan tidak boleh ada dosa yang dilakukan di dalamnya.'

1185.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'What is between the two lava plains of Medina is sacred.'
1185.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Apa yang ada di antara dua dataran lava Madinah adalah haram.'

1186.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Medina is a sanctuary from such-and-such to such-and-such. Its trees should not be cut and no innovation should be introduced in it. Whoever introduces an innovation or shelters an innovator, upon him is the curse of Allah, the angels, and all people.'
1186.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas bin Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Madinah adalah tanah haram dari sini sampai sini. Pohon-pohonnya tidak boleh ditebang dan tidak boleh ada bid'ah yang dimasukkan ke dalamnya. Barangsiapa yang memasukkan bid'ah atau melindungi pelaku bid'ah, maka atasnya laknat Allah, malaikat, dan seluruh manusia.'

1187.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Medina is a sanctuary as far as such-and-such. Its trees should not be cut and no act of disobedience should be introduced into it. Whoever introduces disobedience into it or shelters one who does so, upon him is the curse of Allah, the angels, and all people.'
1187.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali bin Abi Thalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Madinah adalah tanah haram sejauh ini dan itu. Pohon-pohonnya tidak boleh ditebang dan tidak boleh ada kemaksiatan yang dimasukkan ke dalamnya. Barangsiapa yang memasukkan kemaksiatan atau melindungi pelakunya, maka atasnya laknat Allah, malaikat, dan seluruh manusia.'

1188.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'I was commanded to live in a city that devours cities, and they call it Yathrib, and it is Medina. It expels evil people the way bellows expel impurities from iron.'
1188.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Aku diperintahkan untuk tinggal di sebuah kota yang menelan kota-kota, dan mereka menyebutnya Yatsrib, dan ia adalah Madinah. Ia mengusir orang-orang jahat sebagaimana alat pandai besi mengusir kotoran dari besi.'

1189.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Medina is a sanctuary, and whoever commits an offense in it or harbors an offender, upon him is the curse of Allah, the angels, and all people. His obligatory and supererogatory deeds will not be accepted on the Day of Resurrection.'
1189.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Madinah adalah tanah haram, dan barangsiapa melakukan pelanggaran di dalamnya atau melindungi pelanggar, maka atasnya laknat Allah, malaikat, dan seluruh manusia. Amalan wajib dan sunnah-nya tidak akan diterima pada hari kiamat.'

1190.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'O Allah, grant Medina twice the blessing that You granted Mecca.'
1190.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas bin Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Ya Allah, berikanlah Madinah dua kali berkah yang telah Engkau berikan kepada Makkah.'

1191.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Prayer in my mosque is better than a thousand prayers in any other mosque except the Sacred Mosque.'
1191.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Shalat di masjidku lebih baik dari seribu shalat di masjid lainnya kecuali Masjidil Haram.'

1192.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever visits my grave, my intercession becomes obligatory for him.'
1192.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mengunjungi kuburanku, maka syafaatku menjadi wajib baginya.'

1193.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever visits me after my death is like one who visited me in my life.'
1193.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah bin Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mengunjungiku setelah kematianku seperti orang yang mengunjungiku semasa hidupku.'

1194.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Between my house and my minbar is a garden from the gardens of Paradise.'
1194.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Antara rumahku dan mimbarku adalah taman dari taman-taman surga.'

1195.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'What is between my house and my minbar is a garden from the gardens of Paradise, and my minbar is on my Pool.'
1195.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Apa yang ada di antara rumahku dan mimbarku adalah taman dari taman-taman surga, dan mimbarku berada di atas telagaku.'

1196.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Medina is better for them if they only knew. No one abandons it out of aversion without Allah replacing him with someone better. And no one remains in it bearing its hardships without me being an intercessor for him on the Day of Resurrection.'
1196.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Madinah lebih baik bagi mereka jika mereka mengetahuinya. Tidak ada seseorang yang meninggalkannya karena membencinya kecuali Allah menggantikannya dengan yang lebih baik. Dan tidak ada seseorang yang tetap tinggal di dalamnya sambil menanggung kesulitannya kecuali aku akan menjadi pemberi syafaat baginya pada hari kiamat.'

1197.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever is able to die in Medina, let him do so, for I will intercede for whoever dies in Medina.'
1197.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mampu meninggal di Madinah hendaklah ia melakukannya, karena aku akan memberi syafaat bagi siapa yang meninggal di Madinah.'

1198.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'I forbid anyone from entering Medina without permission to do so. Whoever dies in Medina and has patience in its suffering and seeking its reward, I am an intercessor for him on the Day of Resurrection.'
1198.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd bin Abi Waqqas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Aku melarang siapapun masuk ke Madinah tanpa izin untuk melakukannya. Barangsiapa meninggal di Madinah dengan sabar atas penderitaannya dan mengharapkan pahalanya, aku adalah pemberi syafaat baginya pada hari kiamat.'

1199.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever comes to visit me, intending nothing but visiting me, it is an obligation upon me to intercede for him on the Day of Resurrection.'
1199.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa datang mengunjungiku dan tidak ada maksud lain kecuali mengunjungiku, maka menjadi kewajiban bagiku untuk memberikan syafaat baginya pada hari kiamat.'

1200.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever performs Hajj for the sake of Allah and does not commit sin or lewdness returns as on the day his mother bore him.'
1200.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berhaji karena Allah dan tidak melakukan dosa atau perbuatan cabul, ia kembali seperti pada hari ibunya melahirkannya.'

1201.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever performs Tawaf around the House seven times and prays two rak'ahs, it is as if he has freed a slave.'
1201.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa bertawaf mengelilingi Ka'bah tujuh kali dan shalat dua rakaat, maka seakan-akan ia memerdekakan seorang budak.'

1202.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Messenger of Allah ي: 'O Messenger of Allah, should women perform Jihad?' He said: 'Yes, a Jihad in which there is no fighting: Hajj and Umrah.'
1202.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ي: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah wanita perlu berjihad?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, jihad yang tidak ada peperangan di dalamnya: haji dan umrah.'

1203.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Performing Hajj is an expiation for what came before it, and after the accepted Hajj, there remains only Paradise.'
1203.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Melaksanakan haji adalah kafarat bagi apa yang terjadi sebelumnya, dan setelah haji yang mabrur tidak ada yang tersisa kecuali surga.'

1204.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever performs Hajj to this House every year, Allah has taken it upon Himself to carry him across the Bridge.'
1204.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berhaji ke rumah ini setiap tahun, Allah mengambil atas Diri-Nya untuk membawanya melewati jembatan siraat.'

1205.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The Hajj is expiation, the Hajj is expiation, the Hajj is expiation.'
1205.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Haji adalah kafarat, haji adalah kafarat, haji adalah kafarat.'

1206.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Prophet ي and his companions set out for Hajj. Not one of them entered into ihram for Hajj except those who had sacrificial animals. The Prophet ي and his companions had sacrificial animals. Suraqah ibn Malik ibn Ju'shum met them and said: O Messenger of Allah, explain this to your nation. The Prophet ي said: Your Hajj is valid and complete.'
1206.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ي dan para sahabatnya berangkat untuk haji. Tidak seorang pun dari mereka yang berihram untuk haji kecuali mereka yang memiliki hewan kurban. Nabi ي dan para sahabatnya memiliki hewan kurban. Suraqah bin Malik bin Ju'syum bertemu dengan mereka dan berkata: Ya Rasulullah, jelaskanlah ini kepada umatmu. Nabi ي bersabda: Haji kalian sah dan sempurna.'

1207.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We set out with the Messenger of Allah ي in his final Hajj. Some of us said the Talbiyah for Hajj and some for Umrah. Those who said the Talbiyah for Umrah came out of ihram upon arrival in Mecca, and those who had sacrificial animals remained in ihram.'
1207.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami berangkat bersama Rasulullah ي dalam hajinya yang terakhir. Sebagian dari kami mengucapkan talbiyah untuk haji dan sebagian untuk umrah. Mereka yang mengucapkan talbiyah untuk umrah keluar dari ihram ketika tiba di Makkah, dan mereka yang memiliki hewan kurban tetap dalam ihram.'

1208.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever intended to perform Hajj, let him hasten, for one of you may fall ill or an animal may be lost or a need may arise.'
1208.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berniat untuk berhaji, hendaklah ia bersegera, karena salah seorang dari kalian mungkin jatuh sakit atau hewan mungkin hilang atau mungkin ada kebutuhan yang timbul.'

1209.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Make haste to perform Hajj - meaning the obligatory Hajj - for none of you knows what may befall him.'
1209.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Bersegeralah melaksanakan haji - yakni haji yang wajib - karena tidak ada seorangpun dari kalian yang mengetahui apa yang akan menimpanya.'

1210.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever performs Hajj and does not engage in sexual relations or acts of disobedience returns pure of sin as on the day his mother bore him.'
1210.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berhaji dan tidak melakukan hubungan suami istri maupun perbuatan maksiat, ia kembali bersih dari dosa seperti pada hari ibunya melahirkannya.'

1211.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'There is no Hijra after the Conquest of Mecca, but there is Jihad and intention. If you are called out for Jihad, respond.'
1211.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Tidak ada hijrah setelah Penaklukan Makkah, tetapi ada jihad dan niat. Jika kalian dipanggil untuk jihad, maka penuhilah.'

1212.iwh_en: It was narrated from Muawiyah ibn Abi Sufyan (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'There is no Hijra after the Conquest. Stay in your places and come out to fight when you are called.'
1212.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Muawiyah bin Abi Sufyan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Tidak ada hijrah setelah Penaklukan. Tetaplah di tempat-tempat kalian dan keluarlah untuk berperang ketika kalian dipanggil.'

1213.iwh_en: It was narrated from Safwan ibn Umayyah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Hijra will not cease until repentance ceases, and repentance will not cease until the sun rises from the west.'
1213.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shafwan bin Umayyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Hijrah tidak akan berhenti hingga taubat berhenti, dan taubat tidak akan berhenti hingga matahari terbit dari barat.'

1214.iwh_en: It was narrated from Muawiyah ibn Abi Sufyan (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Hijra will not be cut off so long as the enemy is fought. But it may happen that a man emigrates, and his land is his homeland.'
1214.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Muawiyah bin Abi Sufyan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Hijrah tidak akan terputus selama musuh diperangi. Namun mungkin saja seseorang berhijrah dan negerinya adalah tanah airnya.'

1215.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said on the Day of the Conquest of Mecca: 'There is no Hijra, but there is Jihad and sincere intention.'
1215.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda pada Hari Penaklukan Makkah: 'Tidak ada hijrah, tetapi ada jihad dan niat yang tulus.'

1216.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fudayk (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'People claim that whoever does not emigrate is ruined. But a man came to me and said: O Messenger of Allah, I am a Bedouin who cannot emigrate. The Prophet ي said: Establish prayer, pay zakat, and avoid sin. You are a muhajir.'
1216.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fudaik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Orang-orang mengklaim bahwa siapa yang tidak berhijrah pasti binasa. Namun seorang laki-laki datang kepadaku dan berkata: Ya Rasulullah, aku adalah seorang Badui yang tidak bisa berhijrah. Nabi ي bersabda: Dirikanlah shalat, tunaikanlah zakat, dan jauhilah dosa. Kamu adalah seorang muhajir.'

1217.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'O Messenger of Allah, is Jihad obligatory on women?' He said: 'Jihad with no fighting in it: Hajj and Umrah.'
1217.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah jihad wajib atas wanita?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jihad yang tidak ada peperangan di dalamnya: haji dan umrah.'

1218.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever departs as a pilgrim or as one performing Umrah and dies, he will not be shown his account of deeds on the Day of Resurrection, and it will be said to him: Enter Paradise.'
1218.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berangkat sebagai jamaah haji atau umrah lalu meninggal dunia, ia tidak akan ditampilkan catatan amalnya pada hari kiamat, dan dikatakan kepadanya: Masuklah ke surga.'

1219.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever stoned the jamarat and shaved his head has completed the greater part of Hajj, and whoever prayed Fajr at al-Muzdalifah has completed Hajj.'
1219.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang telah melempar jumrah dan mencukur kepalanya telah menyelesaikan bagian terbesar dari haji, dan barangsiapa yang shalat Subuh di Muzdalifah telah menyelesaikan hajinya.'

1220.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'There is no qiran (combining Hajj and Umrah) after this year.'
1220.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Tidak ada qiran (menggabungkan haji dan umrah) setelah tahun ini.'

1221.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The sacrifice (hady) suffices for those who did not bring a sacrificial animal, even if they are fasting, and the Day of Arafah is Eid for the people of Arafah.'
1221.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Hewan kurban (hady) mencukupi bagi mereka yang tidak membawa hewan kurban, meskipun mereka berpuasa, dan hari Arafah adalah hari raya bagi orang-orang yang berada di Arafah.'

1222.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever cannot afford the hady (sacrificial animal) during Hajj al-Tamattu, let him fast three days during Hajj and seven when he returns home.'
1222.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa tidak mampu membayar hady (hewan kurban) dalam haji tamattu, hendaklah ia berpuasa tiga hari selama haji dan tujuh hari ketika kembali ke rumah.'

1223.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The crescent moons are fixed times for the people and for Hajj.'
1223.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Bulan-bulan sabit adalah waktu yang ditetapkan bagi manusia dan untuk haji.'

1224.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said about the verse regarding crescent moons: 'They are signs for people to know the times of their acts of worship and their commerce.'
1224.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda tentang ayat mengenai bulan-bulan sabit: 'Mereka adalah tanda-tanda bagi manusia untuk mengetahui waktu ibadah dan perdagangan mereka.'

1225.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever does not find a sacrificial animal should fast three days during Hajj and seven after returning home - that is ten complete days.'
1225.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa tidak menemukan hewan kurban hendaklah berpuasa tiga hari selama haji dan tujuh hari setelah kembali ke rumah - itu adalah sepuluh hari lengkap.'

1226.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever does Hajj al-Tamattu and does not find a sacrificial animal, let him fast three days during Hajj and seven when he returns.'
1226.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa melakukan haji tamattu dan tidak menemukan hewan kurban, hendaklah ia berpuasa tiga hari selama haji dan tujuh hari ketika kembali.'

1227.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'We went out with the Messenger of Allah ي and he said: Whoever wishes to combine Umrah and Hajj may do so, and whoever wishes to make Hajj alone may do so, and whoever wishes to make Umrah alone may do so.' Aisha said: 'The Messenger of Allah and those who had sacrificial animals made Hajj, and those who had no sacrificial animals made Umrah then Hajj.'
1227.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami keluar bersama Rasulullah ي dan beliau bersabda: Barangsiapa ingin menggabungkan umrah dan haji silakan melakukannya, barangsiapa ingin berhaji saja silakan melakukannya, dan barangsiapa ingin berumrah saja silakan melakukannya.' Aisyah berkata: 'Rasulullah dan mereka yang memiliki hewan kurban berhaji, dan mereka yang tidak memiliki hewan kurban berumrah kemudian haji.'

1228.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said in the sermon at Arafah: 'Do you know what day this is? Do you know what land this is? Do you know what month this is?' They said: 'Sacred day, sacred land, sacred month.' He said: 'Your blood, your wealth, and your honor are sacred among you as the sacredness of this day of yours, in this land of yours, in this month of yours.'
1228.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir bin Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda dalam khutbah di Arafah: 'Tahukah kalian hari apa ini? Tahukah kalian negeri apa ini? Tahukah kalian bulan apa ini?' Mereka menjawab: 'Hari suci, negeri suci, bulan suci.' Beliau bersabda: 'Darah kalian, harta kalian, dan kehormatan kalian adalah suci di antara kalian sebagaimana kesucian hari ini, di negeri kalian ini, di bulan kalian ini.'

1229.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said in his farewell sermon: 'O people, what land is this? What month is this? What day is this?' They said: 'Sacred land, sacred month, sacred day.' He said: 'Verily your blood, your wealth, and your honor are sacred to you as the sacredness of this day, this month, and this land, until you meet your Lord.'
1229.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda dalam khutbah wada': 'Wahai manusia, negeri apa ini? Bulan apa ini? Hari apa ini?' Mereka menjawab: 'Negeri suci, bulan suci, hari suci.' Beliau bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya darah kalian, harta kalian, dan kehormatan kalian adalah suci bagi kalian seperti kesucian hari ini, bulan ini, dan negeri ini, hingga kalian menemui Tuhan kalian.'

1230.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Whoever performs Hajj and does not commit sexual immorality or wickedness returns as on the day his mother bore him.'
1230.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Barangsiapa berhaji dan tidak melakukan perbuatan cabul atau kefasikan, ia kembali seperti pada hari ibunya melahirkannya.'

1231.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Verily this House is a support. Whoever intends it with Hajj or Umrah is in the protection of Allah, the Most High. If he dies, Allah enters him into Paradise, and if he returns, he returns with reward and booty.'
1231.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya rumah ini adalah tiang penyangga. Barangsiapa yang menujunya dengan haji atau umrah berada dalam perlindungan Allah Yang Maha Tinggi. Jika ia meninggal, Allah memasukkannya ke surga, dan jika ia kembali, ia kembali dengan pahala dan ghanimah.'

1232.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'The Hajj is the lesser Jihad.'
1232.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Haji adalah jihad yang lebih ringan.'

1233.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sulayman ibn Yasar (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abu Ayyub al-Ansari set out to perform Hajj and his animal was lost. He came to Umar ibn al-Khattab on the Day of Sacrifice. Umar said: 'Do what a person who performs Umrah does, then come out of ihram, then when Hajj comes next year, perform Hajj and offer whatever sacrificial animal is easy for you.'
1233.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sulaiman bin Yasar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abu Ayyub al-Anshari berangkat untuk haji dan hewan kendaraannya hilang. Ia datang kepada Umar bin al-Khattab pada Hari Penyembelihan. Umar berkata: 'Lakukanlah apa yang dilakukan seseorang yang berumrah, kemudian keluarlah dari ihram, lalu ketika haji tiba tahun depan, berhajilah dan sembelihlah hewan kurban yang mudah bagimu.'

1234.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Safiyyah bint Huyayy got her period after the Tawaf al-Ifadah. I mentioned this to the Messenger of Allah ي. He said: Is she going to detain us? I said: O Messenger of Allah, she has already done Tawaf al-Ifadah and then got her period. He said: Then let her leave.'
1234.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Shafiyyah binti Huyayy mendapat haid setelah Tawaf Ifadah. Aku menyebutkan hal ini kepada Rasulullah ي. Beliau bersabda: Apakah ia akan menahan kita? Aku berkata: Ya Rasulullah, ia sudah melakukan Tawaf Ifadah kemudian mendapat haid. Beliau bersabda: Kalau begitu biarkan ia pergi.'

1235.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Women are excused from the farewell Tawaf if they are menstruating.'
1235.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Wanita dimaafkan dari tawaf wada jika mereka sedang haid.'

1236.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Safiyyah got her menses after she had done the Tawaf al-Ifadah. I mentioned that to the Messenger of Allah ي and he said: She may travel then.'
1236.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Shafiyyah mendapat haid setelah ia melakukan Tawaf Ifadah. Aku menyebutkan itu kepada Rasulullah ي dan beliau bersabda: Kalau begitu ia boleh berangkat.'

1237.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ي departed from Mecca after his prayers, and he prayed Zuhr at Dhi Tuwa. Then he entered Mecca and directed us to the mosque, and he prayed two rak'ahs, and those who came with him prayed with him.'
1237.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ي berangkat dari Makkah setelah shalatnya, dan beliau shalat Zhuhur di Dzi Tuwa. Kemudian beliau masuk ke Makkah dan mengarahkan kami ke masjid, dan beliau shalat dua rakaat, dan orang-orang yang bersamanya shalat bersamanya.'

1238.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Mecca is sacred; its thorny plants should not be cut down, its animals should not be hunted, and items lost in it should not be picked up except by one who announces them, and its fresh herbage should not be cut.'
1238.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Makkah adalah tanah suci; tanaman berduri di dalamnya tidak boleh dipotong, binatangnya tidak boleh diburu, dan barang yang hilang di dalamnya tidak boleh dipungut kecuali oleh orang yang mengumumkannya, dan rerumputannya yang segar tidak boleh dipotong.'

1239.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ي said: 'Allah made Mecca sacred on the day He created the heavens and the earth. It is sacred by the sanctity of Allah until the Day of Resurrection. Fighting in it was not lawful for anyone before me, and it was not made lawful for me except for one hour of the day. It is sacred by the sanctity of Allah until the Day of Resurrection.'
1239.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ي bersabda: 'Allah menjadikan Makkah suci pada hari Dia menciptakan langit dan bumi. Ia suci dengan kesucian Allah hingga hari kiamat. Berperang di dalamnya tidak dihalalkan bagi siapapun sebelumku, dan tidak dihalalkan bagiku kecuali satu jam dalam sehari. Ia suci dengan kesucian Allah hingga hari kiamat.'
